zh.lifeSummary: Birger Magnusson Folkungaätten是Magnus 'Minnesköld' Bengtsson和Ingrid Ylva till Bjälbo的兒子，於1200年之後出生在瑞典額斯特格特藍德比亞爾波。他於1234年之後與Ingeborg Eriksdotter結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1266年10月21日在瑞典，埋葬在瑞典維亞斯特拉 格塔藍德瓦恩姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Birger Magnusson Folkungaätten是Magnus 'Minnesköld' Bengtsson和Ingrid Ylva till Bjälbo的儿子，于1200年之后出生在瑞典額斯特格特藍德比亞爾波。他于1234年之后与Ingeborg Eriksdotter结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1266年10月21日在瑞典，埋葬在瑞典維亞斯特拉 格塔藍德瓦恩姆。

nameMeanings.name: Magnusson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Niels, Anders, Erland, Gisli, Kerstin, Lars, Nils, Ottar, Thor.  German Hans, Kurt, Fritz.
Swedish: patronymic from the personal name   Magnus  .
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, or North German   Magnussen  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Magnus
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Bernd, Egon, Erwin, Kurt, Otto, Reinhard, Volker, Wilhelm, Wolfgang.

German, Flemish, and Walloon: from the personal name Magnus, which is from the Latin adjective magnus ‘great’ or a Latinized form of a short form of ancient Germanic compound names based on the element magan ‘strength, might’. The name was borne by several early Christian saints, including St. Magnus (8th century), a monk in St. Gallen in Switzerland and missionary in Allgäu in southern Germany, whose real name was Magnoald. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine). In Belgium, it may also be a Latinized (humanistic) form of Walloon Legrand .

English, Scottish, Swedish, Danish, Norwegian, and North German: from the Scandinavian personal name Magnus, borne by Magnus the Good (died 1047), king of Norway and Denmark, who was named for the Emperor Charlemagne, Latin Carolus Magnus ‘Charles the Great’, under the impression that Magnus was a personal name. The name spread from Norway to the eastern Scandinavian royal houses, and became popular all over Scandinavia and thence in the English Danelaw. It has also been adopted as a Jewish name.

variants.name: Magnuson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Nels, Helmer, Sven, Kerstin, Alf, Anders, Hilma, Knut, Monrad, Thor.
Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish   Magnusson  .
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, and North German   Magnussen  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Manson
meanings: Scottish (mainly the Northern Isles): shortened form of   Magnusson  .

English: patronymic, probably sometimes from the Middle English personal name Man, Manne (Old English Mann(a) or Old Danish Manni) + -son; compare Mann . Occasionally perhaps from a Middle English personal name Mainstan (Old English Mægenstān, from mægen ‘might, power’ + stān ‘stone’).
Americanized form of Swedish Månsson (rarely Månson): patronymic from the personal name Måns, a derivative of Magnus . Compare Monson .

nameMeanings.name: Birger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse: apparently an agent derivative of biarga ‘to help’. Earlier forms of the name are Birghir and Byrghir. It has been in use from the Viking period to the present day, and it may in some cases have been chosen as a masculine form of Birgit .

historicEvents.description: King Eriksson died. Valdemar crowned King. Birger Jarl declared regent until Valdemar is of age.

historicEvents.title: Earliest Mention of Stockholm
historicEvents.description: The earliest known recorded history of the city of Stockholm is in Norse sagas as Agnafit which dates to 1252. The city rose to prominence due to Baltic trade. Stockholm is now the most populous urban area in the region.

en.lifeSummary: Birger Magnusson Folkungaätten was born after 1200, in Bjälbo, Östergötland, Sweden as the son of Magnus 'Minnesköld' Bengtsson and Ingrid Ylva till Bjälbo. He married Ingeborg Eriksdotter after 1234. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 21 October 1266, in Sweden, and was buried in Varnhem, Västra Götaland, Sweden.

fr.lifeSummary: Birger Magnusson Folkungaätten est né après 1200, à Bjälbo, Östergötland, Suède, fils de Magnus 'Minnesköld' Bengtsson et Ingrid Ylva till Bjälbo. Il a épousé Ingeborg Eriksdotter après 1234. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 21 octobre 1266, à Suède, et a été enterré à Varnhem, Västra Götaland, Suède.

de.lifeSummary: Birger Magnusson Folkungaätten wurde nach 1200 in Bjälbo, Östergötland, Schweden, als Sohn von Magnus 'Minnesköld' Bengtsson und Ingrid Ylva till Bjälbo geboren. Er hat nach 1234 Ingeborg Eriksdotter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 21. Oktober 1266 in Schweden und wurde in Varnhem, Västra Götaland, Schweden begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Birger Magnusson Folkungaätten è nato il dopo il 1200 nel Bjälbo, Östergötland, Svezia come figlio di Magnus 'Minnesköld' Bengtsson e Ingrid Ylva till Bjälbo. Lui sposato Ingeborg Eriksdotter dopo il 1234. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 21 ottobre 1266, nel Svezia, e fu sepolto a Varnhem, Västra Götaland, Svezia.

ja.lifeSummary: Birger Magnusson Folkungaättenは1200年以後にスウェーデンoステルグoトランドブジaルボでMagnus 'Minnesköld' BengtssonとIngrid Ylva till Bjälboの息子として生まれた。1234年以後にIngeborg Eriksdotterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1266年10月21日にスウェーデンで死去し，スウェーデンvaストラ グoタランドバーンヘムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Birger Magnusson Folkungaätten(은)는 1200년 이후 스웨덴 o스터그o틀랜드 브제이a보에서 Magnus 'Minnesköld' Bengtsson(와)과 Ingrid Ylva till Bjälbo의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1234년 이후 Ingeborg Eriksdotter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1266년 10월 21일 스웨덴에서 사망했으며 스웨덴 브a스트라 그o탤란드 바른헤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Birger Magnusson Folkungaätten nasceu após 1200, em Bjälbo, Östergötland, Suécia filho de Magnus 'Minnesköld' Bengtsson e Ingrid Ylva till Bjälbo. Ele casou-se com Ingeborg Eriksdotter após 1234. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de outubro de 1266, em Suécia, e foi sepultado em Varnhem, Västra Götaland, Suécia.

ru.lifeSummary: Birger Magnusson Folkungaätten родился после 1200 г. в местности бджaлбо, oстиргoтланд, Швеция. Его родителей звали Magnus 'Minnesköld' Bengtsson и Ingrid Ylva till Bjälbo. Он женился на женщине по имени Ingeborg Eriksdotter после 1234 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 21 октября 1266 г. в местности Швеция и был похоронен в местности варнем, вaстра гoталанд, Швеция.

es.lifeSummary: Birger Magnusson Folkungaätten nació después de 1200, en Bjälbo, Östergötland, Suecia como hijo de Magnus 'Minnesköld' Bengtsson y Ingrid Ylva till Bjälbo. Se casó con Ingeborg Eriksdotter después de 1234. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 21 de octubre de 1266, en Suecia, y fue sepultado en Varnhem, Västra Götaland, Suecia.
